# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

Prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: backup-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    location: US
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: index.html
      notFoundPage: error.html
    logging:
      logBucket: backup-logs-bucket
    cors:
    - origin: []
      method: []
      responseHeader: []
      maxAgeSeconds: 0
    iamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - allUsers
      - role: roles/storage.objectCreator
        members:
        - allUsers
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    labels:
      environment: backup
      created: "2023"
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    lifecycle:
      rule: []
    retentionPolicy:
      retentionPeriod: 0
    publicAccessPrevention: enforced
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true
    bucketEncryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    enableObjectRetention: false
    enableLogging: true
    enableVersioning: false
    enableLifecycle: false
